title: Transcendence Loop — Phased Build Plan
summary: Phased build plan for the Transcendence PVPvE loop: constellation shards, transcend levels past C6, shard theft, parties, and a raid-boss faucet.
notes: Type set from MANIFEST_TYPE=PRD (authoritative). Document is a phased roadmap/PRD carrying a 'Locked decisions' + 'Naming conventions' contract and 'Design invariants'; those locked items are requirement-level here, not an Accepted ADR, so locked=false per schema.
